notableEvents.detail: A.J. Ewing doubles (4) on a line drive to left fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Juan Soto scores. Jared Young scores. A.J. Ewing to 3rd. Throwing error by left fielder Mike Yastrzemski.

notableEvents.label: Luis Torrens GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis Torrens grounds into a double play, third baseman Austin Riley to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Brett Baty to 3rd. MJ Melendez out at 2nd. Luis Torrens out at 1st.
